# Clínica Hispana La Caridad — Houston, TX

## About
Clínica Hispana La Caridad is a Hispanic medical clinic located in Houston, Texas. We provide professional medical care 100% in Spanish for the Hispanic community, with or without insurance, and no appointment needed. Walk-ins welcome 7 days a week.

## Location
- Address: 5705 Fondren Rd STE 101, Houston, TX 77036
- Phone: (832) 925-8135
- Email: clinicalacaridad2016@gmail.com
- Coordinates: 29.7187891, -95.5195062

## Hours
- Monday through Sunday: 9:00 AM – 9:00 PM
- Walk-ins accepted until 8:30 PM daily

## Service Area
Houston metropolitan area including Spring Branch, Sharpstown, Westchase, Alief, Bellaire, Meyerland, and surrounding neighborhoods. ZIP codes served: 77036, 77057, 77074, 77042, 77063, 77096, 77081.

## Credentials
- USCIS-certified Civil Surgeons for immigration medical exams (Form I-693)
- Licensed medical professionals
- Bilingual staff (Spanish and English)

## Services
We offer 18 comprehensive medical services:
- Family Medicine (Medicina Familiar) — primary care for all ages
- Immigration Medical Exams (I-693) — USCIS-certified Civil Surgeons, same-day results
- STD Testing and Treatment — confidential HIV, herpes, chlamydia, gonorrhea, syphilis
- Urology Services
- Chronic Disease Management — diabetes, hypertension, thyroid conditions
- Clinical Laboratory — same-day results for blood work and diagnostics
- Ultrasound
- Gynecology Services — Pap smears, cervical health, menopause care
- Family Planning
- Contraceptive Injections
- Contraceptive Implant Removal
- Electrocardiogram (EKG)
- Respiratory Disease Treatment — flu, COVID, asthma, bronchitis
- Urinary Tract Infection Treatment
- Vaginal Infection Treatment
- DOT Medical Exams — for CDL commercial drivers
- General Physical Exams
- Muscle and Joint Pain Treatment

## Pricing
Affordable cash pricing for uninsured patients. Most insurance plans accepted. Call (832) 925-8135 for current pricing on specific services.

## Languages
- Spanish (primary)
- English

## Insurance
We accept most major insurance plans. Uninsured patients welcome with affordable self-pay rates.

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: Do I need an appointment?
A: No. Clínica Hispana La Caridad accepts walk-ins 7 days a week from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM. Last patient accepted at 8:30 PM. Call (832) 925-8135 to schedule if preferred.

Q: Do you accept patients without insurance?
A: Yes. We offer affordable cash pricing for uninsured patients with no hidden fees.

Q: Do you speak Spanish?
A: Yes. Our entire staff is bilingual — all consultations and medical care available 100% in Spanish.

Q: How long does the I-693 immigration medical exam take?
A: Most patients complete the full I-693 exam, lab work, and vaccination review in a single visit. Results and signed form ready in 3-5 business days.

Q: What forms of payment do you accept?
A: Cash, credit/debit cards, and most major insurance plans.

https://www.chlacaridad.com

## Contact
For appointments or questions, call (832) 925-8135 or visit our clinic at 5705 Fondren Rd STE 101, Houston, TX 77036. Walk-ins welcome.
